title: Execution with only error events
description: An execution that produces only error-typed events (e.g., container spawn failure, session creation failure). All error events must be delivered correctly via SSE with proper event_type classification.

content.error: Docker API error: no such image

production_scenario: An execution that fails early (e.g., Docker image not available, OpenCode not reachable). The error events are the only useful output — they must all reach the frontend.
